license_summary: Demo-only local reference until license review and original replacement assets are complete.
allowed_operations: Render redacted AgentOps MIS state as an optional local demo read model.
Link zones and rooms back to formal AgentOps MIS authority pages.
Use screenshots or local observation as non-authoritative design evidence.
forbidden_operations: Do not commit third-party Star Office UI art, sprite, image, audio, build output, node_modules, cache, or dist artifacts.
Do not make Star Office UI own AgentOps MIS workspace, task, run, approval, memory, artifact, evaluation, runtime event, or audit authority.
Do not use Star Office UI as the interface that agents scrape for work instructions.
Do not claim commercial-ready Pixel Office assets from this packet.
Do not ingest raw prompts, raw responses, private messages, full transcripts, credentials, local DBs, generated exports, or customer raw documents.
runtime_requirements: Optional local Star-Office-UI checkout for visual inspection.
No runtime required for CI acceptance.
No live Hermes/OpenClaw execution required for this packet.
product_claim_limit: Local demo read model reference only; AgentOps MIS remains the authority ledger and public/commercial assets must be original or separately licensed.
rollback_plan: Remove the optional Pixel Office visual reference route/link or packet entry; formal AgentOps MIS workspace, task, run, approval, memory, artifact, evaluation, runtime event, and audit pages remain authoritative.
